REMITTITUR FILED DEFENDANT CRISWELL APPPEALS A TRIAL COURT JUDGMENT FINDING HIM PERSONALLY LIABLE ON SEVERAL WRITTEN CONTRACTS FOR OUTDOOR ADVERTISING. HAVING REVIEWED ALL THE PAPERS SUPPOR- TING AND OPPOSING THE APPEAL, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THE JUDGMENT FINDING WILLIAM CRISWELL PERSONALLY LIABLE ON THE WRITTEN CONTRACTS IS REVERSED.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLER MEDIA COMPANY, A CORPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CRISWELL, WILLIAM AKA BILL J CRISWELL INDIVIDUALLY & DBA CRISWELL ASSOCIATES DOES 1 THROUGH 50 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-18-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-13-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-30-1997

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-01-1997, OFF CALENDAR
PLTF'S POST TRIAL BRIEF IS RECEIVED AND FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRISWELL, WILLIAM AKA BILL J CRISWELL INDIVIDUALLY & DBA CRISWELL ASSOCIATES $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $10,602.72 INTEREST, $237.39 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $38,665.11, COSTS PER COST BILL. THE THEORY OF QUANTUM MERIT IS REJECTED AND IS NOT A BASIS FOR THE RECOVERY IN THIS CASE.
